repeatType.description: The period at which this maintenance window repeats, if any

repeatEvery.description: The number of repeatType units between each repetition of the maintenance window. For example, with a repeatType of "weekly" and a repeatEvery of 3, the maintenance window would recur every 3 weeks.

repeatOnWeekly.description: The day(s) of the week to repeat on if repeatType = "weekly". Submit as a string of comma-separated numbers representing the day of the week, such that 1 = Sunday and 7 = Saturday. For example: Monday, Wednesday, Friday = "2,4,6"

repeatByMonthly.description: When repeatType = "monthly", this determines whether the repeat is based on the day of the month ("The second of every month") or the day of the week ("The third Thursday of every month")

groupType.description: The group type, where "0" is for computer group IDs, "1" is for question group IDs, and "2" is for limiting group IDs

get.description: Get Software Packages (v4) - Gets filtered, sorted and paged software packages. Ex: https://example.cloud.tanium.com/plugin/products/deploy/v4/software-packages?skip=0&take=200&platform[]=macos&platform[]=windows&productVendor[]=Audacity&applicability[]=Install+Eligible&contentSetId[]=12&confidence[]=inapplicable&confidence[]=calculating&text=Aud

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Skip the specified number of software packages

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Returns up to the specified number of software packages

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Returns a list of software packages filtered by name matching the given value.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: A list of OS platforms to filter on

parameters.name: productVendor
parameters.description: A list of vendors to filter on

parameters.name: productName
parameters.description: An exact list of names to filter on

parameters.name: inUse
parameters.description: Returns a list of software packages filtered by whether the software package is not in use, in use, in use by auto-import, or in use by bundle

parameters.name: applicability
parameters.description: A list of applicability statuses to filter on

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: An exact list of user names to filter on

parameters.name: onlyLatestVersion
parameters.description: Returns a list of software packages filtered by whether the package is the latest version

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.description: A list of confidence statuses to filter on

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Returns a list of software packages sorted by the specified field

parameters.name: includeAllFields
parameters.description: By default the only fields included in the software packages results are the ones needed to fill out the table and expanded result. Setting this field will return all fields on the software packages

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: A list of categories to filter on

data.description: contains a list of the software packages in the catalog

post.description: Create Temp File (v1) - Creates a new temporary file. File Upload:  If size is set, this request will be considered a file upload. This request will prepare the server to receive file chunks via [PUT] "Upload Temp File" requests. Remote File/Folder:  If location is set and size is not set, this request will be considered a remote resource download, which is either a file or a folder, depending on type. The server will begin downloading the remote resource immediately. You may query the status of the downloading file with a [GET] "Get Temp File Status by ID".

data.description: contains information about the newly created file

location.description: (Required if size is not provided) The location from which to download the file or folder.

type.description: (Required if not a file upload) The type of remote resource for this temp file

size.description: (Required if location is not provided) The total size of the temp file to upload

delete.description: Delete Temp File - Deletes the temp file with ID, id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the temp file to delete

get.description: Get Temp File Status by ID - Gets status for a single temp file by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the temp file to get status of

data.description: contains information about the temp file with ID, id

put.description: Upload Temp File (v1) - Uploads bytes to a temp file in chunks, appending data to the end of the file on the server. The file is base64 encoded in the body directly, and not in a json object. Use the header content-type 'text/plain' instead of 'application/json' for this request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the temp file being uploaded

data.description: contains an object describing the progress of the temp file upload

get.description: Query Is File Cached - Checks if the file with ID, id, is cached on the server. Returns a Success 200 if the file is cached, and an error response otherwise.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the temp file to get status of
